content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Realty (+3.03%), Metal (+0.86%), Pharma (+0.84%), Energy (+0.64%) leading. Nifty +0.53% to 24124 with VIX cooling. Financials and capital goods showing strong follow-through post Q4 results. Book is well-positioned at 52% deployed; focus is trailing SLs on winners and selective adds.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +6.2% but stock is fading from 1057 high to 1046 with bearish intraday structure (lower highs from 11:00). SL already at 1035 (breakeven+5%) is appropriate. No-op MODIFY would be wasted - using HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.2%, SL 1035 already locks in ~5% gain on entry 984. Stock consolidating near VWAP 1050. No need to tighten further yet - give room for continuation toward 1110 target. Bullish Q4 thesis intact (PAT +19%, GNPA <1%)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 2.2%; SL 119 still ~3% below CMP 122.36, no SL trip. Defensive thesis intact (Fed cuts, central bank buying). MACD bearish but tape stable. Hold to SL or 135 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.85,
      "new_target": 25.20,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op - same as stored. Replacing with HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +1.5% after strong Q4 (PAT +23%, AUM Rs 5L cr milestone). SL 950 is currently above CMP 958 by only 0.84% - that creates same-day stopout risk. However stored SL is already above entry 944, locking in some gain. Holding through; if stock breaks above 966 will trail higher next tick."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1700.00,
      "new_target": 1790.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +1.7% on Q4 beat (cargo 500MMT, +25% revenue). Stock surged to 1748 high then faded to 1722. Trailing SL up from 1715 to 1700 (entry breakeven) per the trailing SL mandate when P&L moves favorably. Keeps 0.5%+ gap from CMP 1722 (1.3% buffer)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -0.5%, opened at 1590 high then faded to 1524 low - failed breakout above 52w high 1590.80. Volume 4.2x ADV suggests distribution at top. SL 1510 is 1.8% below CMP 1538, gives room. Internal Audit head resignation right before May 14 board meeting is a yellow flag - if stock breaks 1510 it triggers cleanly. Hold for now, monitor close."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -2.1% after gap-up to 13976 faded all day to 13519. Q4 PAT -6.4% YoY despite revenue records. SL 13400 is 0.9% below CMP - tight enough. Final dividend Rs 140 and record April sales support thesis. Hold through; will exit on SL trip."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.7%, but stock made fresh 52w high 212.66 today on 8.2x volume. Strong Q4 (PAT +68% YoY), ICICI/SBI MF stake-up catalyst. SL 204 is 2.0% below CMP - appropriate for breakout with retest. No tightening needed yet."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4480.00,
      "new_target": 4790.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L flat -0.3%, but explosive intraday from 4356 to 4590 (+5.4%). Defence theme intact. SL 4480 is 1.8% below CMP 4576. Holding to give breakout room toward 4790. May 2026 IAF Tejas review is binary risk to watch."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +0.9%, realty sector top performer today. SL 488 is 4.5% below CMP 510.95. May 11 board meeting (Q4 results + dividend) is binary catalyst within next 5 sessions - per binary-event rule, will reassess at next tick whether to tighten SL or trim into result."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "EXIDEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 130,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 374.00,
      "stop_loss": 360.00,
      "target": 400.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Fresh 8-month high breakout on +2.89% with 1.5x volume. Q4 conf-call May 6 catalyst (3 days). Q3 PAT +23.7% YoY beat peer Amara Raja (-53%); Li-ion 3GWh line operational. Entry 374, SL 360 (-3.7%), target 400 (+7.0%), R:R 1.86. Position size ~5% (~Rs 48,620). Auto sector +0.45% supportive. Note: Q4 conf call May 6 is a binary event within 3 sessions - sizing at ~5% per binary-event-discipline rule for event trades."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "+6.2% with SL already at 1035 locking ~5% gain. Will trail above 1054 R1 break."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position, SL 119 has 3% room. Hold thesis."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.85,
      "reasoning": "+1.7%, SL at 23.85 already at near breakeven. Pharma sector leading; let it run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 950.00,
      "reasoning": "+1.5%, SL 950 above entry. Q4 momentum strong. Will trail above 966 break."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1700.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail from 1715 to 1700 to lock breakeven. Stock made high 1748 then faded; risk now is reversion."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1510.00,
      "reasoning": "Failed breakout intraday; SL 1510 is 1.8% below. Audit head resignation flag. Monitor for SL trip."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 13400.00,
      "reasoning": "Down -2.1%; SL at 13400 is 0.9% below CMP. Tight. Hold to SL or rebound."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 204.00,
      "reasoning": "Fresh 52w high on volume; thesis strong. SL 204 (-2%) appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 4480.00,
      "reasoning": "+5.4% intraday move; SL 4480 gives breakout room. Defence theme intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 488.00,
      "reasoning": "Realty leader; May 11 board meeting binary. Will reduce/tighten before event."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "FLUOROCHEM: +11% gap on Q4 beat (PAT +88%) is strong but late entry now - wait for retest of Rs 3600 zone. SUNPHARMA: near 52w high on Organon deal, but May 21 Q4 results = binary risk - skip new entry. CESC: at 52w high 204.50 then faded to 194 (-5% from high) - wait for May 6 results. KOTAKBANK: dip-buy candidate but RBI digital embargo overhang persists - need clearer base. BHEL/LALPATHLAB/SYNGENE/RRKABEL/CONCORDBIO/ADANIGREEN/BAJAJ-AUTO/LAURUSLABS/MANAPPURAM/GODREJPROP: all already extended on the move; won't chase late.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is +0.91% today, well-positioned with 10 swing names across Financials, Realty, Auto, Capital Goods, Pharma, ETFs (Gold/Pharma). Cash ~48% leaves headroom. EXIDE add (~5% position) is one new entry on a fresh-breakout + Q4 catalyst setup. Sector exposure within limits. ADANIPORTS SL trailed to breakeven. ANANTRAJ has May 11 binary - will trim/tighten next session. GESHIP has audit-head resignation flag - on watch."
}
